headline: Kirkwood Pulse • May 06, 2026
overview: The Cardinals defeated the Brewers 6-3 at Busch Stadium, marking their seventh win in eight games, with Ivan Herrera's bases-loaded double driving in three runs. This victory highlights the Cardinals' strong recent performance and roster changes, including the recall of Cesar Prieto and the optioning of Thomas Saggese.

items.title: Monday’s Game Report: Cardinals 6, Brewers 3
items.excerpt: Ivan Herrera's double with the bases loaded was the big hit for the Cardinals on Monday night, sending them to a win over the Brewers at Busch Stadium. [...]The post Monday’s Game Report: Cardinals 6, Brewers 3 appeared first on…
